import { __decorate } from "tslib"; import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, ViewEncapsulation, } from '@angular/core'; /** * Header app-level en 3 zones (cf. décision J.1). * * Slots ng-content : * ```html * * * * Se connecter * * ``` * * Aucune logique métier hardcodée. L'app insère ce qu'elle veut dans * la zone actions (auth, notifications, profil, etc., cf. J.5). */ let PfHeaderComponent = class PfHeaderComponent { }; PfHeaderComponent = __decorate([ Component({ selector: 'pf-header', standalone: true, changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, encapsulation: ViewEncapsulation.None, template: `
`, }) ], PfHeaderComponent); export { PfHeaderComponent };
